## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor:`)
- [ ] Documentation update (`docs:`)
- [ ] CI/tooling change (`ci:` / `chore:`)
- [ ] Breaking change (add `!` after type, e.g., `feat!:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines in `.github/copilot-instructions.md`
- [ ] I have added or updated tests for my changes
- [ ] All existing tests pass locally
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (README, plans, API docs)
- [ ] I have checked for and resolved any merge conflicts
- [ ] No secrets or credentials are included in this PR
